data.hyperedge_name: <hyperedge>"Interest may be paid annually or added to loan balance"
<hyperedge>"7.3 Interest may be paid annually or added to loan balance"
<hyperedge>"2.3 You may skip payments as long as the Account Value is sufficient to cover monthly deductions."
<hyperedge>"Planned Premium: $200/month"
<hyperedge>"Interest is credited to Account Value daily based on the current credited interest rate."
<hyperedge>"10.3 Upon lapse, any Account Value in excess of surrender charges will be paid to you automatically."
<hyperedge>"1.1 'Account Value' means the accumulation of premiums paid, less deductions for monthly charges and expenses, plus interest credited."
<hyperedge>"You may make partial withdrawals from Account Value at any time."
<hyperedge>"2.4 If Account Value falls below the amount needed to pay monthly charges, the policy will enter a 61-day grace period."
<hyperedge>"Outstanding loan reduces death benefit dollar-for-dollar"
<hyperedge>"10.2 If sufficient premium is not received within 61 days, policy lapses."
<hyperedge>"8.1 Cash Surrender Value = Account Value - Surrender Charge - Outstanding Loans"
<hyperedge>"Minimum Premium: $75/month"
<hyperedge>"Guaranteed minimum rate: 2.0% per annum Current rate: 3.5% per annum (subject to change monthly)"
<hyperedge>"1.2 'Cost of Insurance' (COI) means the monthly charge for the death benefit based on the insured's age, sex, and risk class."
<hyperedge>"Minimum withdrawal: $500 Maximum: Account Value minus amount needed to keep policy in force"
<hyperedge>"1.5%, minimum 4%, adjusted annually each January 1"
<hyperedge>"3.1 On each Monthly Deduction Date, we deduct from Account Value"
<hyperedge>"10.1 If Account Value is insufficient to pay monthly deductions, we will notify you. Policy continues for 61 days."
<hyperedge>"Contract Number: FPS-UL-24-03391"
<hyperedge>"On each Monthly Deduction Date, we deduct from Account Value: (a) Cost of Insurance charge (b) Administrative expense charge: $8.00/month (c) Any outstanding policy loan interest."
<hyperedge>"Target Premium: $200/month"
<hyperedge>"We may declare different rates for different policy years or account value amounts."
<hyperedge>"8.2 Surrender Charge Schedule (% of Specified Amount): Year 1: 8% | Year 5: 5% | Year 10: 2% | Year 15+: 0%"
<hyperedge>"1.3 'Monthly Deduction Date' is the 10th day of each month."
<hyperedge>"Withdrawal charges: Years 1-10: $25 per withdrawal Years 11+: No charge"
<hyperedge>"Issue Date: March 10, 2024"
<hyperedge>"Death Benefit Option: Level (Option A)"
<hyperedge>"OPTION A (Level Death Benefit) - Currently Selected Death Benefit = Specified Amount"
<hyperedge>"1.4 'Surrender Charge' is a percentage-based charge applied if the policy is surrendered in the first 15 years."
<hyperedge>"Withdrawals reduce Account Value and may reduce death benefit if Account Value falls below minimum required."
<hyperedge>"Executed at Phoenix, Arizona"
<hyperedge>"8.3 Upon surrender, the policy terminates and coverage ends."
<hyperedge>"Owner: Robert James Wilson"
<hyperedge>"Primary: Jennifer Ann Wilson (Wife) - 100%"
<hyperedge>"OPTION B (Increasing Death Benefit) - Available by Request Death Benefit = Specified Amount + Account Value"
<hyperedge>"2.1 You may pay premiums at any time and in any amount, subject to the following limits: Minimum: $75 per payment; Maximum: $50,000 per year (subject to tax limitations)"
<hyperedge>"Maximum loan: 90% of current Account Value"
<hyperedge>"7.4 Outstanding loan reduces death benefit dollar-for-dollar"
<hyperedge>"Insured: Robert James Wilson"
<hyperedge>"Cost of Insurance is calculated as: (Specified Amount - Account Value) × Monthly COI Rate / 1,000."
<hyperedge>"Contingent: Robert Wilson Jr. (Son) - 50%"
<hyperedge>"You may change death benefit options subject to: (a) Evidence of insurability if increasing coverage (b) Payment of a $50 processing fee"
<hyperedge>"2.2 Premiums are allocated to the Account Value after deduction of a 3% premium expense charge."
<hyperedge>"Loan interest rate: Variable rate = Moody's Corporate Bond Index + 1.5%, minimum 4%, adjusted annually each January 1"
<hyperedge>"9.2 CONTESTABILITY: We may contest this policy for material misrepresentation within 2 years of issue date while insured is living."
<hyperedge>"Specified Amount (Face Value): $400,000"
<hyperedge>"COI rates are guaranteed not to exceed those shown in the rate schedule attached to this policy."
<hyperedge>"Emily Rose Wilson (Daughter) - 50%"
<hyperedge>"Death benefit is paid minus any outstanding policy loans."
<hyperedge>"9.1 SUICIDE EXCLUSION: If insured dies by suicide within 24 months of issue date, we pay only the Account Value, without interest."
